title: AsymX Engine Register v1
purpose: druk verlagen door alle bekende engines één plek, status en kleinste volgende stap te geven

engines.name: Source Vault / Bron-Kluis Engine
engines.purpose: Preserve original source unchanged; all processing happens as metadata, pointers, labels, routes, or temporary expressions.
engines.next_smallest_step: Keep as non-negotiable rule in every prompt, README, and tool.

engines.name: Non-Destructive Fractal Architecture
engines.purpose: Let systems split, label, map, and re-express source material without overwriting the source.
engines.next_smallest_step: Reference it from the Engine Register and future README files.

engines.name: AsymX SoLuTri Field Engine
engines.purpose: Meta-engine for Source → Pointers → Field → Web → Temporary Expression → Feedback → Variation → Validation → Retention.
engines.next_smallest_step: Use as umbrella name in future registry and public docs.

engines.name: Claim Safety / Bewijsveiligheid Engine
engines.purpose: Prevent overclaiming by separating observation, hypothesis, supported pattern, and proven fact.
engines.next_smallest_step: Create or link a small Level 1 claim-safety lens.

engines.name: Release Level 1 Protocol
engines.purpose: Publish small, local-only, inspectable, no-upload, no-backend, no-tracking lenses with one clear behavior.
engines.next_smallest_step: Keep every public lens inside this rule.

engines.name: Logistics Level 1 / Ghost Pick Analyzer
engines.purpose: Static local-only logistics lens for repeated manco, ghost pick, short pick, floor/WMS mismatch and shadow-run visibility.
engines.next_smallest_step: Leave stable; only update docs if needed.

engines.name: Intentional Alignment / SEO Engine
engines.purpose: Use SEO as ethical intent-routing: help the real searcher find the real mechanism without marketing push.
engines.next_smallest_step: Reuse in every public Level 1 lens with head terms + depth terms + no-data-policy.

engines.name: Structuur Engine Chat Intake Vault
engines.purpose: Store AI chat/source text intact and categorize into VERHAALOPBOUW, DUBBEL/HERHALING, and RUIS/NU NIET.
engines.next_smallest_step: Connect output format to Engine Register / Chat Capsule format.

engines.name: Story Filter / Verhaalfilter
engines.purpose: Simple three-outcome story/chat filter: story-building, repetition, or noise-for-now.
engines.next_smallest_step: Leave simple; do not overbuild.

engines.name: Fractal Web Navigator V3
engines.purpose: Navigate source, fields, cells, fragments, triads, risk, safe rewrite, web view, trace pad and exports without changing source.
engines.next_smallest_step: Treat as prototype; do not merge into main app until register/dependencies are clear.

engines.name: Prompt Router / AI Output Status Engine
engines.purpose: Route AI output into usable statuses: FILE, ANCHOR, PROMPT, CLAIMCHECK, NOISE, OPEN_END.
engines.current_form: Concept; not yet completed as tool
engines.next_smallest_step: Build a minimal local Level 1 paste-and-label tool.

engines.name: Cursor Prompt Safety Engine
engines.purpose: Protect working files from destructive edits, unwanted refactors, deletion, overbuilding, or source mutation.
engines.next_smallest_step: Create fixed Cursor safety prompt and checklist.

engines.name: Open Eindjes Engine
engines.purpose: Capture phrases like later, missing, not ready, after Sligro, park this, open end, and turn them into visible follow-up anchors.
engines.next_smallest_step: Add open_eindjes section to every chat capsule and bundle export.

engines.name: Chat Capsule / Chat Web Index Engine
engines.purpose: Compress full chats into durable capsules with title, date, anchors, engines, open ends, and source links before chats are deleted.
engines.next_smallest_step: Define capsule schema and create first manual capsule export.

engines.name: Export Alles / Bundle Engine
engines.purpose: Export source, chunks, labels, claims, report/book/kid versions, deepsearch, conclusions, open ends, and engine status in one bundle.
engines.next_smallest_step: Define bundle JSON + Markdown format.

engines.name: Engine Dependency Map
engines.purpose: Show which engine feeds which other engine so maturity and blockers become visible.
engines.current_form: Concept; this register is first foundation
engines.next_smallest_step: Generate simple A → feeds → B list from this register.

engines.name: Public GitHub Lens Registry
engines.purpose: Public index of existing, planned, safe, and concept Level 1 lenses.
engines.current_form: Concept; partially present in Level 1 Open Field Map
engines.next_smallest_step: Create docs/lens_registry.md from Engine Register.

engines.name: Symbool Engine
engines.purpose: Let interface items and symbols grow together through colors, touch, voice, personal anchors and live validation.
engines.current_form: Conceptual layer; not yet public on GitHub
engines.next_smallest_step: Do not build yet; first register as planned lens.

engines.name: Always-On Field Engine
engines.purpose: Capture-first phone/server/Mac pipeline: audio events, local sync, Whisper, story-first display, classification and local storage.
engines.current_form: Working foundation; product layer not finished
engines.next_smallest_step: Park until after Sligro/registry stabilization; keep core files sacred.

engines.name: Audio-Haptic Feedback Engine
engines.purpose: Map KOMT, SPEELT, BLIJFT to phone pings and watch vibrations.
engines.next_smallest_step: Store as protocol; do not build before Always-On resumes.

engines.name: Family / Personal Interface Engine
engines.purpose: Modular personal interfaces for user, Sol, Luna, Trini, Sheila, Oma; start simple, add agenda/connection/symbol layers later.
engines.next_smallest_step: Keep parked; only add to registry now.

engines.name: Report / Book / Kid Story Output Engine
engines.purpose: Re-express the same source as mail, report, book, kid story, graphs, conclusions, solutions, and deepsearch.
engines.current_form: Output logic; not yet one-button engine
engines.next_smallest_step: Wait for Export Bundle format; then make one-button outputs.

engines.name: Sligro / AsymX Anchor Engine
engines.purpose: Official Release Level 1 anchor for AsymX → Logistics → Sligro; not a rushed report but a growth anchor.
engines.next_smallest_step: Do not force-send; keep as user-controlled anchor.

engines.name: Hypothesis / Samenkomst Engine
engines.purpose: Treat HYPOTHESE / IDEEËN as invitation to a chosen form of coming together: measurement, conversation, pilot, workshop, validation, or co-creation.
engines.next_smallest_step: Use in report/outreach language; no separate tool needed yet.

engines.name: BEING / Presence Engine
engines.purpose: Keep presence, observation, and expression separate from tasks; BEING stays passive and does not become DOING.
engines.next_smallest_step: Do not turn into task engine.
